news.headline: US top court rules against state ban on ‘conversion therapy’ for LGBTQ+ youth
news.summary:
The US Supreme Court on Tuesday ruled against a law banning “conversion therapy” for LGBTQ+ kids in Colorado, one of about two dozen states that ban the discredited practice.

news.headline: Céline Dion's triumphant return to the city of lights: Ten Paris concerts confirmed
news.summary: The rumours turned out to be true: Céline Dion will return to the stage in the French capital in September and October at the La Défense Arena. As fans gear up to get their tickets, FRANCE 24's Olivia Salazar-Winspear takes a closer look at the Canadian superstar's love affair with Paris.
